title: The Deserter's Charm
description: A rusted charm dangles from a deserter's sun-bleached skull, still faintly warm. They say it kept its last owner breathing — by making them run from every fight they could.

options.text: Wear it — survival first (Heal to full)
options.result: Warmth floods your wounds and they knit shut in seconds. But a cold thread of dread settles in with it — your hands won't stop wanting to flee.
You leave the charm with its owner. Some bargains aren't worth the asking.
